name: tarborist
description: Static analysis for navigating and debugging complex R targets pipelines

tarborist.additionalSingleTargetFactorie.markdownDescription: Additional `tar_target()`-like factory names to treat as single-target factories during static analysis. Use this only for factories that create exactly one target and follow the same `name` / `command` / `pattern` shape as `tar_target()`, for example `tar_parquet`.

tarborist.executeInPlace.enabled.markdownDescription: Override `Cmd/Ctrl+Enter` inside valid targets command regions so tarborist runs the target command in place instead of Positron's default editor execution.

tarborist.targetHeatmap.enabled.markdownDescription: Highlight target definition names with a subtle background color based on `_targets/meta/meta` runtime metadata.

tarborist.targetHeatmap.metric.markdownDescription: Metric used for target heatmap highlighting: output `size` or build `runtime`.

tarborist.targetHeatmap.minSizeBytes.markdownDescription: Minimum target output size in bytes before any heatmap color is applied.

tarborist.targetHeatmap.sizeBreaksBytes.markdownDescription: Ascending target size breakpoints, in bytes, used to bucket heatmap intensity after `tarborist.targetHeatmap.minSizeBytes`.

tarborist.targetHeatmap.minRuntimeSecond.markdownDescription: Minimum target runtime in seconds before any heatmap color is applied.

tarborist.targetHeatmap.notBuiltColor.markdownDescription: Background color used for targets that have not been built yet and therefore do not have a build timestamp in `_targets/meta/meta`.

tarborist.targetHeatmap.runtimeBreaksSec.markdownDescription: Ascending target runtime breakpoints, in seconds, used to bucket heatmap intensity after `tarborist.targetHeatmap.minRuntimeSeconds`.

tarborist.targetHeatmap.palette.markdownDescription: Background colors used for the target heatmap buckets. Keep these subtle and semi-transparent so they coexist with diagnostics and selections.

tarborist.targetStatusDecorations.enable.markdownDescription: Mark target definition names when `_targets/meta/meta` reports a warning or error status for the last build.

tarborist.targetStatusDecorations.style.markdownDescription: Render target warning/error status as a leading icon before the target name or as a wavy underline.

tarborist.targetStatusDecorations.errorC.markdownDescription: Wavy underline color for targets whose last build recorded an error.

tarborist.targetStatusDecorations.warnin.markdownDescription: Wavy underline color for targets whose last build recorded a warning but not an error.

commands.title: Targets: Run Here Without Moving Cursor
